Name: Meadow Create
Description: Creates a new record via a Meadow REST endpoint.

SettingsInputs.Name: Endpoint
SettingsInputs.Description: Base URL of the Meadow API

SettingsInputs.Name: DataAddress
SettingsInputs.Description: State address of the record data to create

SettingsInputs.Name: Destination
SettingsInputs.Description: State address to store the created record
